summary: Iteration 13 — Designation Master CRUD, Jobs Archive/Delete, Employee Pipeline (Database), Auto EMPxxxx codes, Excel template/export/import, Migration backfill. Backend: 16/16 pytest passed. Frontend: All required data-testids present and integrations working after frontend restart (env var was stale).
passed_tests: GET /api/designations returns 15 seeded items incl. Technician, Service Advisor, Franchise Manager
PUT /api/designations updates name/active; DELETE rejects 400 if referenced by employee; succeeds otherwise
POST /api/jobs creates with role from designation; archive→closed, reopen→open, delete→404
POST /api/employees auto EMP0001+ code; manual code accepted; duplicate manual code → 400; invalid employee_type → 400
GET /api/employees/pipeline-stats returns 9 stages + summary {total, head_office, franchise, joined, hold, rejected}
POST /api/employees/{id}/transition Hold requires hold_reason (400), Rejected requires rejection_reason (400), Joined sets status=active, stage history logged
POST /api/employees/excel/import created=2 / skipped=2 (invalid stage + invalid employee_type rows reported in errors[])
Migration: raw doc with only category=branch → backfilled employee_type=franchise, current_stage=joined, status=active, employee_code=EMP0008 (idempotent)
FRONTEND: /designations page loads with sidebar-nav-designations, create-designation-button, designation-name-input, save-designation-button — designation CRUD works
FRONTEND: /jobs page job-role-select populated from /api/designations (15 options dynamic, no hardcoded list)

FRONTEND: /database page mirrors Lead Pipeline — counters (counter-total/ho/franchise/joined/hold/rejected), all 9 stage tabs (new, qualified, hr, manager, selected, three_months, joined, hold, rejected) with live counts, '3 Months' label correctly maps to value 'three_months'

FRONTEND: Add Employee dialog (testids emp-name-input, emp-phone-input, emp-type-select, emp-stage-select, emp-designation-select, emp-code-input, save-employee-button) + 'HEAD OFFICE EMPLOYEE' badge visible on card
FRONTEND: download-template-button, excel-import-button (+ excel-import-input), excel-export-button, employee-type-filter, employee-search-input all present
action_items: Frontend was serving with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=undefined (all API calls hit /undefined/api/...). Root cause: frontend process was started before /app/frontend/.env was finalized; CRA only reads env on start. Fixed during this test session by `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend`. Recommend main agent verify the deployed pipeline restarts frontend after any .env change.
critical_code_review_comments: EmployeeCreate dialog uses data-testid `emp-name-input` / `emp-type-select` / `emp-stage-select` / `emp-designation-select` / `emp-code-input` / `save-employee-button` — review request mentioned generic IDs without prefix; if a future test agent expects `employee-name-input`, harmonise naming.

DELETE /api/employees/{id} endpoint is not implemented in routes/employees.py. Test cleanup of TEST_ employees was a no-op (returns 405). Not blocking but leaves test rows; consider adding a CEO-only delete endpoint or a TEST_ cleanup helper.
/employees/{id}/transition allows rejected → joined transitions without resetting status. Consider explicit guards if business requires immutability after rejection.
/employees route registration ordering OK (specific routes /excel/* and /pipeline-stats before /{employee_id}).
seed_data_creation: Created and immediately deleted: 3 TEST_ designations, 1 TEST_Used designation (left in DB intentionally as proof of in-use deletion block - no cleanup endpoint), 7-8 TEST_ employees (no DELETE endpoint, remain in DB), 2 Excel-imported TEST_Imp employees, 1 migration test employee (cleaned up).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration13_designations_pipeline.py. Frontend: after any .env change in /app/frontend/.env, you MUST run `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` for CRA to pick up REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — otherwise all API calls go to /undefined/api/.... Login via form works; @ in email is NOT a Playwright problem here (prior agent's hypothesis was wrong — actual problem was the env-var). Stage value for '3 Months' label is 'three_months'. Employee dialog testids use 'emp-*' prefix.
rca of the issue: Initial frontend login failed with `404 /undefined/api/auth/login`. RCA: Frontend was started before /app/frontend/.env was finalized so `process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL` was undefined inside the CRA bundle. Mitigation: `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend`. Recommend main agent ensure deploy pipeline restarts frontend after any .env edit.
